claims.quote: With one of the nation's largest graduate medical education (GME) programs, UCSF School of Medicine GME is where excellence in patient care, innovation, and equity converge to shape the future of medicine.
claims.claimText: UCSF School of Medicine operates one of the nation's largest GME programs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page describes GME residency/fellowship infrastructure at UCSF — trainee tier.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: In partnership with UCSF Health, the San Francisco Veterans Affairs Medical Center, and Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital and Trauma Center, as well as 50+ additional training sites, we strive daily to provide our residents and fellows with the highest quality education and training.
claims.claimText: UCSF GME training delivered in partnership with UCSF Health, SF VA, ZSFG, and 50+ additional training sites.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Lists training partner sites for residents and fellows — Tier 2.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: With general expertise in specialty selection, residency applications and matching, Dr. Brent Kobashi, Dr Neeti Parikh and Dr. Jessie Werner are available for:General advising about career exploration
claims.claimText: UCSF Medical Education provides career advising directors who support specialty selection, residency applications, and matching for UCSF medical students.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is internal UCSF medical-student career advising for residency match — Tier 2 trainee pipeline content, not Tier 1 USCE.
claims.limitations: Internal UCSF student advising; not an offer to external observers or visiting students.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Please note that appointments are for current and graduated UCSF Medical Students only
claims.claimText: Career advising appointments are restricted to current and graduated UCSF Medical Students only.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Restriction is about UCSF student career advising, a Tier 2 internal trainee resource, not USCE admissions.
claims.limitations: Restriction applies to advising appointments, not to a USCE program.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: UCSF provides residents and clinical fellows a rich package of health and welfare benefits at a good value. These plans are different than those offered to faculty and staff. Plans include health, dental, vision, disability, and life insurance.
claims.claimText: UCSF provides residents and clinical fellows a benefits package including health, dental, vision, disability, and life insurance.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Benefits described are explicitly for residents and clinical fellows, placing this content in Tier 2 trainee territory.

claims.quote: Residents and clinical fellows are automatically enrolled in the Safe Harbor Defined Contribution Plan. Pre-tax contributions to 403(b) or 457(b) plans are optional.
